scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) with high caloric needs, normal weight, and no dietary restrictions to verify adequate carbohydrate and calorie distribution
taskDescription: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete

promptInputs.goal: Prepare for marathon race with optimal energy and endurance

solutionCriteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total daily calories with emphasis on complex carbs
Total daily caloric intake aligns with high-performance endurance athlete needs (approximately 2800-3200 calories)
Plan is concise and fits on a single page with clear meal times and portions

scenario: Testing with a strength-focused athlete (weightlifter) who is overweight, has a muscle-building goal, and maintains a vegan dietary restriction to ensure protein sources and meal timing align with resistance training
taskDescription: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete

promptInputs.goal: Build muscle mass while reducing body fat

solutionCriteria: All meals contain vegan protein sources (legumes, tofu, tempeh, nuts, seeds, plant-based proteins)
Protein intake is adequate for muscle building with meals timed around resistance training
Meal plan is compact and concise, fitting on a single page with clear meal times
Plan supports muscle-building goal while accounting for current weight status

scenario: Testing with a lightweight athlete (dancer/gymnast) who is petite, has a body composition goal, is lactose intolerant, and requires lower overall calories with nutrient density emphasis
taskDescription: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete

promptInputs.goal: Improve body composition and lean muscle definition

solutionCriteria: All meals are lactose-free with no dairy products included
Caloric intake is appropriate for petite athlete with nutrient-dense foods prioritized
Meal plan is compact and concise, fitting on a single page with clear meal times
Meals support body composition goal with balanced macronutrients and micronutrient variety

scenario: Testing with a multi-sport athlete of average build who has an injury recovery goal, follows a gluten-free diet, and needs anti-inflammatory food prioritization with balanced macronutrients
taskDescription: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete

promptInputs.goal: Support injury recovery and reduce inflammation

solutionCriteria: All meals are gluten-free with no wheat, barley, or rye products included
Meal plan emphasizes anti-inflammatory foods such as fatty fish, berries, leafy greens, and healthy fats
Macronutrients are balanced across meals to support recovery and athletic performance
Meal plan is compact and concise, fitting on a single page with clear meal times
